PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander J. Markevich, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court queries Mr. Markevich regarding what experience he has with Administering a California Probate matter. Mr. Markevich reports that this is his first time and intends to handle the matter without an attorney unless he needs one. The court then notes that probate procedures in Colorado are more informal than in California. The court then advises Mr. Markevich that it is considering appointing him, but the question is whether to do so with full authority or with limited authority and with a minimum bond to protect potential creditors, regardless that the will waives bond. Mr. Markevich provides oral testimony regarding his extensive educational and professional background and states that he plans to sell the real property so is hopeful that the court will appoint him with full authority to simplify the procedure. The court reminds Mr. Markevich regarding his duties as Administrator confirming that he should not make distributions without prior court approval. After additional discussion, the court advises Mr. Markevich that the Court intends to grant the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-08-2005 will be admitted to probate. Alexander J. Markevich will be appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond will be set at $20,000. Michael Kasolas will be appointed probate referee. Status on the Filing of an Inventory and Appraisal will be set for Apr-04-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on Close of Estate will be set for Dec-05-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Petition for Probate of Will is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
